docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-28-1993, CONTINUED TO JUL-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. SANCTIONS IMPOSED AGAINST PLTF'S COUNSEL FOR $100 STAYED TO IF DISMISSAL IS FILED, IF NOT PLTF. TO APPEAR ON THAT DAY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
